---
title: <!-- title of the lesson starting with with "Lesson x.x" -->
subtitle: <!-- Unit x, Lesson x -->
format: html
---

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Quick Links

| Practice | Primer | Slides | Examples | Lecture Notes | Next Lesson |
|----------|--------|--------|----------|---------------|-------------|
| [🏃‍♂️‍➡️](../practice/practice1_1.qmd) | [🌱](../primer/primerx_x.qmd) | [🧑‍🏫](../lecture_slides/lecture_slides1_1.qmd) | [📓]({{< var example_base >}}1_1.ipynb "Opens in Google Colab - See README if broken") | [📋](link) | [➡️](lesson1_2.qmd) |


## Before Class

| Practice | Primer | Previous Lesson |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| [🏃‍♂️‍➡️](link) | [🌱](link) | [⬅️](link) |

## After Class

| Practice | Primer | Next Lesson |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| [🏃‍♂️‍➡️](../practice/practice1_1.qmd) | [🌱](../primer/primer1_1.qmd) | [➡️](lesson1_2.qmd) |

:::

# Outcomes

APIs & Your First LLM Call

- Define what an API is, broadly and practically
- Make an API call to an LLM — seamless environment setup
- Be aware of common challenges when working with APIs

# Preparation

None today (first day of class!)

# Lecture

<!-- Main lecture content goes here -->
<!-- This includes slides, notebooks, and instructor notes -->

::: {style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; overflow: hidden;"}
<iframe 
  src="../lecture_slides/slide1_1.html" 
  style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; border: 0;" 
  allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
:::

<a href="../lecture_slides/slide1_1.html" target="_blank">Fullscreen Presentation</a>


# Activity

<!-- Activity instructions, code, visualizations, and downloads -->

# Before next class

<!-- Instructions, including any prep work, finishing class work, project work, or a practice homework -->

| Practice | Primer | Slides | Next Lesson |
|----------|--------|--------|-------------|
| [🏃‍♂️‍➡️](link) | [🌱](link) | [🧑‍🏫](link) | [➡️](link) |
</template>



<example>
---
title: "Unit 1.2: Call and LLM"
format: html
---

# Outcomes

APIs & Your First LLM Call

- Define what an API is, broadly and practically
- Make an API call to an LLM — seamless environment setup
- Be aware of common challenges when working with APIs

# Preparation

None today (first day of class!)

# Links

| Powerpoint | Example | Primer | Practice | Lecture Notes |
|------------|---------|--------|----------|---------------|
| [:teacher:](lecture_slides/slide1_1.pptx) | [:notebook:](examples/example1_1.qmd) | [:seedling:](primers/primer1_1.qmd) | [🏃‍♂️‍➡️](practice/practice1_1.qmd) | :clipboard:(instructor_notes/notes1_1.qmd)

<!-- More stuff -->



# Before next class

<!-- Instructions, including any prep work, finishing class work, project work, or a practice homework -->

| Practice | Primer | Slides | Next Lesson |
|----------|--------|--------|-------------|
| [🏃‍♂️‍➡️](link) | [🌱](link) | [🧑‍🏫](link) | ➡️(link) |
